ham.subject: Scheduled VPN Maintenance – March 15, 2:00‑4:00 UTC
ham.body:
Hello Team,

Please be advised that our corporate VPN servers will undergo scheduled maintenance from 02:00 UTC to 04:00 UTC on Monday, March 15. During this period, VPN access may be temporarily unavailable. We recommend saving your work and planning accordingly.

For troubleshooting and status updates, visit <URL>.

If you encounter issues, please contact the IT Help Desk at helpdesk@company.com.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Best regards,
IT Operations

spam.subject: URGENT: Security Alert – Verify Your Account Now
spam.body:
Dear Valued Employee,

Our security system has detected an unauthorized login attempt to your corporate email account from an IP address in Brazil. To protect your account and ensure continued access, we urgently need you to confirm your identity.

Please click the link below within 24 hours to verify your personal details:

<URL>

Failure to complete verification will result in a temporary suspension of your email account until further notice.

If you do not recognize this activity, please contact the Corporate Security Team immediately.

Thank you for your swift action.

Sincerely,
Corporate Security
